popularStory.headline: Kloosterrade (Rolduc)
popularStory.description: In 1104, a young priest by the name of Ailbertus of Antoing founded an Augustinian abbey in the Land of Rode, near the river Wurm. The abbey was called Kloosterrade, which later became 's-Hertogenrade …

zh.Liège, Belgium: 比利時迪瑟 德 利艾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Hendrik II van Limburg-Aarlen於1112年11月16日出生在比利時迪瑟 德 利艾時，他的父親Walram II Paganus van Limburg27歲，母親Jutta von Geldern-Wassenberg21歲。他於1136年與Mathilde von Saffenberg在比利時利艾利布格結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1139年被列為count of arlon。他去世於1167年8月19日在義大利拉其羅馬羅馬享年54歲，埋葬在荷蘭利包格可可拉德。

zh-hans.Liège, Belgium: 比利时迪瑟 德 利艾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hendrik II van Limburg-Aarlen于1112年11月16日出生在比利时迪瑟 德 利艾时，他的父亲Walram II Paganus van Limburg27岁，母亲Jutta von Geldern-Wassenberg21岁。他于1136年与Mathilde von Saffenberg在比利时利艾利布格结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他于1139年被列为count of arlon。他去世于1167年8月19日在意大利拉其羅馬羅馬享年54岁，埋葬在荷兰利包格可可拉德。

nameMeanings.name: van
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Anh, Thanh, Hung, Minh, Vinh, Dung, Hue, Huong, Lan, Quang, Tan, Thuy, Hong, Chi, Hang, Ho, Pok, Sang, Bai, Chin, Ching, Chu, Chuan, Dong.
Vietnamese (Vạn): from the Chinese surname 萬, see Wan 1.
Vietnamese (Văn): from the Chinese surnames 文 or 聞, see Wen 2 and 3, and also 5 below.

variants.name: Wan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Hong, Yi, Qi, Qiang, Wai, Yiu, Yuk, Chien-Min, Fang, Hin, Jichun, Li, Man, Chung, Min, Yiping, Pak, Sik, Sung Man.  Vietnamese Tin, Bang, Da, Hien, Hoi, Lan, Minh Quang, Sau, Tich, Tung, Yaping, Yuet.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 萬, which means ‘ten thousand’ literally or ‘very great number’ figuratively: (i) from the personal name of Bi Wan (畢萬), an official in the state of Jin (located in present-day Shanxi province). He was said to be a descendant of Bi Gong Gao (known as Duke of Bi), the 15th son of the virtuous King Wen of Zhou (reined 1152–1056  BC ). Bi Wan was later granted the fiefdom of Wei (魏), which in 403  BC  became the state of Wei (located in present-day Shanxi, Shaanxi, Henan and Hebei provinces). Some of his descendants adopted Wei (魏) as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his personal name, as their surname. (ii) from the personal name Wan (萬), style name of Rui Bo (芮伯, the Earl of Rui), an official of the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771  BC ), who was granted the fief Rui (located in Ruicheng in Shaanxi province). Some of his descendants inherited Rui (芮), the name of the fief, as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his style name, as their surname. (iii) from the placename Wan (萬), the name of a fief (located in Juxian in Shandong province) granted during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ) to an official in the ancient state of Chu. (iv) from the first element of the name of the Wan Si (萬俟) family, who lived in the downstream areas of the Yellow River during the Northern Qi dynasty (550–577  AD ). (v) from the second element of the name of the Tu Wan (吐萬) family, who are members of the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 完, meaning ‘complete’ in Chinese: (i) said to be borne by the descendants of Huan Zhui, a grandson of the Duke Huan of Song (ruler of the state of Song, died 651  BC ). (ii) from Wan (完), the name of Qu Wan (屈完), an official in the state of Chu during the Spring and Autumn Period (770–476  BC ). (iii) shortened form of the compound surname Wan-Yan (完顔), a surname from minority ethnic groups such as Juchen ethnic group in ancient northern China.

nameMeanings.name: Hendrik
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Henry
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Hendrik II van Limburg-Aarlen was born on 16 November 1112, in Liège, Belgium, his father, Walram II Paganus van Limburg, was 27 and his mother, Jutta von Geldern-Wassenberg, was 21. He married Mathilde von Saffenberg in 1136, in Limbourg, Liège, Belgium. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. In 1139, his occupation is listed as count of arlon. He died on 19 August 1167, in Rome, Roma, Lazio, Italy, at the age of 54, and was buried in Kerkrade, Limburg, Netherlands.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hendrik II van Limburg-Aarlen est né le 16 novembre 1112, à Diocèse de Liège, Belgique, son père, Walram II Paganus van Limburg, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Jutta von Geldern-Wassenberg, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Mathilde von Saffenberg en 1136, à Limbourg, Liège, Belgique. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. En 1139, sa profession de son indiquée est count of arlon. Il est décédé le 19 août 1167, à Roma, Rome, Lazio, Italie, à l’âge de 54 ans, et a été enterré à Kerkrade, Limbourg, Pays-Bas.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hendrik II van Limburg-Aarlen am 16. November 1112 in Bistum Lüttich, Belgien geboren wurde, war sein Vater Walram II Paganus van Limburg 27 und seine Mutter Jutta von Geldern-Wassenberg 21. Er hat 1136 in Limbourg, Lüttich, Belgien Mathilde von Saffenberg geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. 1139 ist sein Beruf als count of arlon aufgeführt. Er starb am 19. August 1167 im Alter von 54 Jahren in Roma, Roma, Lazio, Italien und wurde in Kerkrade, Limburg, Niederlande begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hendrik II van Limburg-Aarlen è nato il il 16 novembre 1112 nel Diocèse de Liège, Belgio, il suo padre, Walram II Paganus van Limburg, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Jutta von Geldern-Wassenberg, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Mathilde von Saffenberg nel 1136, nel Limbourg, Liegi, Belgio. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Nel 1139, la sua occupazione è indicata come count of arlon. Morì il 19 agosto 1167, nel Roma, Roma, Lazio, Italia, all'età di 54 anni, e fu sepolto a Kerkrade, Limburgo, Paesi Bassi.

ja.lifeSummary: Hendrik II van Limburg-Aarlenが1112年11月16日にベルギーディオクeゼ ド リeッジで生まれた時，父Walram II Paganus van Limburgは27歳，母Jutta von Geldern-Wassenbergは21歳であった。1136年にベルギーリeッジリンボウルグでMathilde von Saffenbergと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。1139年，職業はcount of arlonと記録されている。彼は1167年8月19日にイタリアラズオロマロマで54歳で死去し，オランダリンブルグケルクラドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Hendrik II van Limburg-Aarlen(이)가 1112년 11월 16일 벨기에 디오ce스 데 리e지에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Walram II Paganus van Limburg(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Jutta von Geldern-Wassenberg(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1136년 벨기에 리e지 림보우르그에서 Mathilde von Saffenberg(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 1139년, 그의 직업은 count of arlon이었다. 그는 1167년 8월 19일 이탈리아 라지오 로마 로마에서 54세의 나이로 사망했으며 네덜란드 림버그 커크라드에 묻혔다.

pt.16 November 1112–19 August 1167: 16 de novembro de 1112–19 de agosto de 1167
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hendrik II van Limburg-Aarlen nasceu em 16 de novembro de 1112, em Diocèse de Liège, Bélgica, seu pai, Walram II Paganus van Limburg, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Jutta von Geldern-Wassenberg, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Mathilde von Saffenberg em 1136, em Limbourg, Liège, Bélgica. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Em 1139, sua profissão aparece como count of arlon. Ele faleceu em 19 de agosto de 1167, em Roma, Roma, Lazio, Itália, com 54 anos, e foi sepultado em Kerkrade, Limburgo, Países Baixos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hendrik II van Limburg-Aarlen родился 16 ноября 1112 г. в местности диокeс де лиeдж, Бельгия, его отцу по имени Walram II Paganus van Limburg было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Jutta von Geldern-Wassenberg, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Mathilde von Saffenberg в 1136 г. в местности лимбург, лиeдж, Бельгия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. В 1139 году он работал по профессии count of arlon. Он умер 19 августа 1167 г. в местности Рим, рома, лазио, Италия в возрасте 54 лет и был похоронен в местности киркрад, лимбург, Нидерланды.

es.16 November 1112–19 August 1167: 16 de noviembre de 1112–19 de agosto de 1167
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hendrik II van Limburg-Aarlen nació el 16 de noviembre de 1112, en Diocèse de Liège, Bélgica, su papá, Walram II Paganus van Limburg, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Jutta von Geldern-Wassenberg, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Mathilde von Saffenberg en 1136, en Limbourg, Lieja, Bélgica. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. En 1139, su ocupación registrada era count of arlon. Murió el 19 de agosto de 1167, en Roma, Roma, Lazio, Italia, a la edad de 54 años, y fue sepultado en Kerkrade, Limburg, Países Bajos.
